title: fagara guianensis
intro: Fagara guianensis is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the citrus family. It is a tree-like shrub native to the Guianas and tropical regions of Central and South America. Fagara guianensis has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The plant's health benefits include its potential to alleviate conditions such as rheumatism, arthritis, and urinary tract infections, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for various herbal preparations.
